# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI for Pull Requests

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run tests
        id: run_tests
        run: |
          npm test || echo "Tests failed"

      - name: Post results as a comment
        uses: actions/github-script@v4
        with:
          script: |
            const testsResult = '${{ steps.run_tests.outcome }}';
            const commentBody = testsResult === 'failure' ? 'Tests have failed. Please check the logs.' : 'All tests passed!';
            const { owner, repo, number } = context.payload.pull_request;
            await github.issues.createComment({
              owner,
              repo,
              issue_number: number,
              body: commentBody
            });
